raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I filed a formal dispute with American Express regarding a charge of {$590.00} from the merchant XXXX XXXX. I had canceled the reservation and never used the stay ; however, I was still charged.

I attempted to resolve this issue directly with XXXX in a respectful and amicable manner. Unfortunately, instead of providing assistance, XXXX responded to me with insults and mockery, which I find completely unacceptable and highly unprofessional.

I provided American Express with all supporting documentation, including proof of the cancellation, XXXX cancellation policy confirming my right to a refund, communications with XXXX, and evidence that I did not use the accommodation.

Despite this, American Express concluded the dispute in favor of the merchant and stated that the charge was valid. As a responsible customer who has never missed a payment, I believe it is unjust and unreasonable to be held financially responsible for a service I did not receive.

I respectfully request your intervention in this matter to ensure that my rights as a consumer are protected and to assist in reaching a fair resolution. I am willing to provide any additional documentation or evidence you may require.

Thank you for your time and consideration. XXXX XXXX XXXX
